aiDescription: Our team used various AI tools to help with development, learning, and content generation

description.part1: MeowVault is a cozy educational catalog with several games that help improve your JavaScript and TypeScript skills and prepare for technical interviews 🐾😸
description.part2: Users learn through practice and small game tasks, without stress or overload 🎮🐱
description.part3: Learning here is as soft and pleasant as a kitty supporting you with its paw before an interview 🐈💛

components.alex: Backend API, JWT Auth, CORS, CI/CD, Prisma ORM, Supabase, GitHub Actions, Role Guards, Swagger, key-storages, GitHub OAuth, Merge Game CRUD, User CRUD API
components.maria: Loader, User Profile, Account Settings, Change avatar, User Store, User Service
components.pavel: Timer, Achievements, KeyStorage, Header, Footer, Language Switcher, Theme Switcher, Toast, Popup
components.oksana: Registration page, EyeCompass directive, Project mascots
components.alena: Login page, Groq AI, GitHub OAuth button, AuthService, Guards, Interceptors
components.mentor: Code review, architectural decisions, exploring AI capabilities in the project, deployed manual minion Claudya on the entire project

aiDescriptions.chatgpt: Image generation (Alena1409 — characters, kozochkina82 — cats for Hangman), code review, test help, diary formatting
aiDescriptions.claude: Created word lists for games (Alena1409), diary error fixing
aiDescriptions.groq: AI integration for answer checking in Merge Game (Alena1409 + AlexGorSer on backend)
aiDescriptions.qwen: Generated 'smart thoughts day/night' for dev diaries, refactored Swagger decorators, documentation filling (AlexGorSer), vibe-coding about page
aiDescriptions.codeQualityBot: Automatic PR review, code problem highlighting, project status composition
